'''Energy Catapults''' were [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] vehicles used by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Force]]. They were [[Color/Legends|Gray]] in color and fired a single blue energy beam that was highly effective against buildings and stationary [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. Energy Catapaults were built at heavy weapons [[Factory/Legends|factories]]. During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], three Energy Catapaults were stationed in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Harte Secur]]. They were destroyed in the [[Capture of Harte Secur|assault]] of the city led by the Trade Federation [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] [[OOM-9/Legends|OOM-9]].<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Naboo energy catapaults were introduced in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', where they were the artillery unit for the Royal Naboo civilization.<ref name="GB" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
